## Editing.Ingredients.IngredientEditorContext class

Editor context specialized for Ingredient entities. Extends ValidatingEditorContext to provide both pre-validated (base) and raw input (validating) methods for ingredient CRUD operations.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class IngredientEditorContext extends ValidatingEditorContext<IngredientEntity, BaseIngredientId, IngredientId> 
```
